message:
🐛 Guard settings event listener from agent sync on Netlify (#1775)

* 🐛 Fix CSP violations on console.kubestellar.io

- Guard useUpdateProgress WebSocket from connecting to local agent on
  Netlify deployments (runs in Layout on every page load)
- Guard usePersistedSettings from fetching agent settings on Netlify
- Use relative URLs in AlertsContext instead of falling back to
  localhost:8080 (Netlify Functions handle /api/ routes)
- Add api.dicebear.com and fonts.gstatic.com to CSP connect-src
  (needed because MSW intercepts these fetches on production)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Guard settings event listener from agent sync on Netlify

The SETTINGS_CHANGED_EVENT listener in usePersistedSettings was not
guarded by isNetlifyDeployment, so when useAIMode dispatched a
settings change on page load, it triggered saveToBackend() which
attempted to fetch http://127.0.0.1:8585/settings — causing a CSP
violation on console.kubestellar.io.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
